articles.title: Malaysians banned from Budi95 for filling up container in car boot
articles.summary: PETALING JAYA: A viral video of a woman filling up RON95 petrol into a container in a car's boot has got her to lose her fuel subsidy privileges. Read full story

articles.title: Heavy traffic reported on major highways as Raya holidays end
articles.summary: KUALA LUMPUR: Traffic congestion was reported on major highways nationwide as at 8.30 pm tonight, following a surge in vehicles as city dwellers returned from their hometowns. Read full story

articles.title: Heatwave: KL placed under 'warning' level by MetMalaysia
articles.summary: PETALING JAYA: Kuala Lumpur has been listed under Level 1 on Malaysian Meteorological Department's (MetMalaysia) list of areas affected by the current heatwave. Read full story

articles.title: Three remanded over blaze at Nibong Tebal fireworks stall
articles.summary: BUTTERWORTH: Three individuals have been arrested to assist with investigations into an early morning blaze at a fireworks stall in Taman Pekaka, Nibong Tebal. Read full story

articles.title: Man arrested over firecracker blast in Pendang
articles.summary: ALOR SETAR: A man has been arrested to assist in investigations into a firecracker explosion in Pendang last Friday (March 20) that injured seven people. Read full story

articles.title: Woman claims sexual harassment in TBS
articles.summary: KUALA LUMPUR: A woman was allegedly sexually harassed at Terminal Bersepadu Selatan (TBS). Read full story

articles.title: Forest fire scorches 1.2 hectares in Gelugor
articles.summary: GEORGE TOWN: A forest fire at Taman Bukit Gambir in Gelugor near here today destroyed about 1.2 hectares of woodland. Read full story

articles.title: Pahang Sultan urges precautions amid hot, dry weather
articles.summary: KUANTAN: The Sultan of Pahang Al-Sultan Abdullah Ri'ayatuddin Al-Mustafa Billah Shah has urged the public to take extra precautions amid the current hot and dry weather affecting the state. Read full
